description_long: This is a rustic, round loaf of bread with a golden-brown, thick crust that is dusted with flour and features a prominent central score along the top. The crust is uneven and textured, with visible air bubbles and a slightly rough surface, suggesting an artisanal baking process. Small inclusions of what appear to be seeds, grains, or vegetable bits are scattered throughout the crust and interior, adding visual interest and texture. The loaf has a domed shape, with the base being slightly flatter and the top more rounded. The interior, visible at the cut ends, is pale and airy, with an open crumb structure and irregular holes. The overall appearance suggests a hearty, hand-crafted bread, likely suitable for urban bakery displays or street food scenes.
description: A rustic, round loaf of bread with a golden, flour-dusted crust and a central score, featuring a textured, artisanal appearance and visible inclusions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cut face of the bread, revealing the pale, airy interior and the central score on the domed crust.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded, golden-brown crust with visible flour dusting and small inclusions, no interior visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite cut face and the central score, with the crust's texture and inclusions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the rounded crust, flour dusting, and inclusions, with no interior exposed.
materials: bread (wheat flour, water, yeast, salt, inclusions)
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rustic, with a prominent central score running along the top. It is dusted with flour and features a rough, uneven texture with small inclusions and air bubbles.
